---
title: "Wintermoth Sites — VIIRS LSP & Land Cover Extraction"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(exactextractr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyterra)
library(patchwork)
library(httr)
library(stringr)

```

``` {r}
sin_crs    <- "+proj=sinu +lon_0=0 +x_0=0 +y_0=0 +a=6371007.181 +b=6371007.181 +units=m +no_defs"
wgs_crs    <- "EPSG:4326"
target_year <- 2013
plot_dir    <- "../figures"
dir.create(plot_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
make_square <- function(x, y, hx, hy) {
  st_polygon(list(matrix(c(
    x - hx, y - hy,
    x + hx, y - hy,
    x + hx, y + hy,
    x - hx, y + hy,
    x - hx, y - hy
  ), ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE)))
}

decode_glsp_qc <- function(qc) {
  mandatory_raw <- bitwAnd(qc, 0x03)
  mandatory <- dplyr::case_when(
    mandatory_raw == 0 ~ "processed, good quality",
    mandatory_raw == 1 ~ "processed, other quality",
    mandatory_raw == 2 ~ "processed, backup algorithm",
    mandatory_raw == 3 ~ "not processed",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  clim_raw <- bitwShiftR(bitwAnd(qc, 0x1C), 2)
  climatology <- dplyr::case_when(
    clim_raw == 0 ~ "climatology fill 0%",
    clim_raw == 1 ~ "climatology fill 1-5%",
    clim_raw == 2 ~ "climatology fill 6-10%",
    clim_raw == 3 ~ "climatology fill 11-15%",
    clim_raw == 4 ~ "climatology fill 16-20%",
    clim_raw == 5 ~ "climatology fill 21-30%",
    clim_raw == 6 ~ "climatology fill >31%",
    clim_raw == 7 ~ "climatology based detection",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  lw_raw <- bitwShiftR(bitwAnd(qc, 0xE0), 5)
  land_water <- dplyr::case_when(
    lw_raw == 0 ~ "shallow ocean",
    lw_raw == 1 ~ "land",
    lw_raw == 2 ~ "ocean/lake coastline",
    lw_raw == 3 ~ "shallow inland water",
    lw_raw == 4 ~ "ephemeral water",
    lw_raw == 5 ~ "deep inland water",
    lw_raw == 6 ~ "moderate or continental ocean",
    lw_raw == 7 ~ "deep ocean",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )

  data.frame(
    QC_mandatory_quality = mandatory,
    QC_climatology       = climatology,
    QC_land_water        = land_water
  )
}

fetch_satellite_basemap <- function(buf_wgs) {
  # Use a slightly expanded bbox to ensure full coverage
  bb <- st_bbox(buf_wgs)
  pad <- 0.01  # ~1 km padding in degrees
  bb["xmin"] <- bb["xmin"] - pad
  bb["ymin"] <- bb["ymin"] - pad
  bb["xmax"] <- bb["xmax"] + pad
  bb["ymax"] <- bb["ymax"] + pad

  url <- sprintf(
    paste0(
      "https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/",
      "MapServer/export?bbox=%f,%f,%f,%f&bboxSR=4326&size=1024,1024&",
      "imageSR=4326&format=png32&f=image"
    ),
    bb["xmin"], bb["ymin"], bb["xmax"], bb["ymax"]
  )

  tmp  <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  resp <- httr::GET(url, httr::write_disk(tmp, overwrite = TRUE))
  if (httr::status_code(resp) != 200) return(NULL)

  sat <- rast(tmp)
  sat <- flip(sat, direction = "vertical")
  ext(sat) <- c(bb["xmin"], bb["xmax"], bb["ymin"], bb["ymax"])
  crs(sat) <- wgs_crs
  sat
}

clc_df_from_rast <- function(r, clc_lookup) {
  df <- as.data.frame(r, xy = TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(df)

  val_col <- setdiff(names(df), c("x", "y"))[1]

  if (is.numeric(df[[val_col]]) || is.integer(df[[val_col]])) {
    df <- df %>%
      rename(clc_code = all_of(val_col)) %>%
      mutate(clc_code = as.integer(clc_code)) %>%
      left_join(clc_lookup, by = "clc_code")
  } else {
    df <- df %>%
      rename(clc_name = all_of(val_col))
  }

  df %>%
    mutate(clc_name = factor(as.character(clc_name), levels = clc_lookup$clc_name))
}
```

```{r}
wm_location <- read.csv("../../wintermoth_data/wgs_europe_metadata.csv") %>%
  distinct(pop, latitude, longitude, .keep_all = TRUE)

location_sf <- st_as_sf(wm_location, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)

square_buffers <- st_read("../../wintermoth_data/10kmbuffers.shp") %>%
  st_transform(crs = sin_crs)

buf_vect <- vect(square_buffers)
```

```{r Coring land cover classification}

clc_rast <- rast("../../wintermoth_data/CLC/data/U2018_CLC2018_V2020_20u1.tif")
clc_crs  <- crs(clc_rast)
if (nlyr(clc_rast) > 1) clc_rast <- clc_rast[[1]]

clc_lookup <- terra::levels(clc_rast)[[1]] %>%
  dplyr::as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::rename(clc_code = Value, clc_name = LABEL3) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(clc_code = as.integer(clc_code)) %>%
  dplyr::filter(clc_code != 48)


clc_palette_df <- tibble::tribble(
  ~clc_code, ~clc_name, ~clc_group, ~clc_hex,

  # -------------------------------
  # URBAN (deep reds → brown)
  # -------------------------------
   1, "Continuous urban fabric", "Urban / built-up", "#4a0000",
   2, "Discontinuous urban fabric", "Urban / built-up", "#67000d",
   3, "Industrial or commercial units", "Urban / built-up", "#a50f15",
   4, "Road and rail networks and associated land", "Urban / built-up", "#cb181d",
   5, "Port areas", "Urban / built-up", "#ef3b2c",
   6, "Airports", "Urban / built-up", "#fb6a4a",
   7, "Mineral extraction sites", "Urban / built-up", "#8c2d04",
   8, "Dump sites", "Urban / built-up", "#a63603",
   9, "Construction sites", "Urban / built-up", "#7f2704",
  10, "Green urban areas", "Urban / built-up", "#543005",
  11, "Sport and leisure facilities", "Urban / built-up", "#8c6d31",

  # -------------------------------
  # AGRICULTURE (yellow → orange)
  # -------------------------------
  12, "Non-irrigated arable land", "Agriculture", "#ffffcc",
  13, "Permanently irrigated land", "Agriculture", "#fee8c8",
  14, "Rice fields", "Agriculture", "#ffeda0",
  15, "Vineyards", "Agriculture", "#fdd49e",
  16, "Fruit trees and berry plantations", "Agriculture", "#fdbb84",
  17, "Olive groves", "Agriculture", "#fed976",
  18, "Pastures", "Agriculture", "#feb24c",
  19, "Annual crops associated with permanent crops", "Agriculture", "#fd8d3c",
  20, "Complex cultivation patterns", "Agriculture", "#fc4e2a",
  21, "Land principally occupied by agriculture, with significant areas of natural vegetation", "Agriculture", "#d94801",
  22, "Agro-forestry areas", "Agriculture","#f16913",

  # -------------------------------
  # FOREST (darker greens, clearer gradient)
  # -------------------------------
  23, "Broad-leaved forest", "Forest", "#e5f5e0",
  24, "Coniferous forest", "Forest", "#a1d99b",
  25, "Mixed forest", "Forest", "#31a354",

  # -------------------------------
  # SEMI-NATURAL (purple + grey, stronger contrast)
  # -------------------------------
  26, "Natural grasslands", "Semi-natural", "#f2f0f7",
  27, "Moors and heathland", "Semi-natural", "#cbc9e2",
  28, "Sclerophyllous vegetation", "Semi-natural", "#9e9ac8",
  29, "Transitional woodland-shrub", "Semi-natural", "#6a51a3",
  30, "Beaches, dunes, sands", "Semi-natural", "#d9d9d9",
  31, "Bare rocks", "Semi-natural", "#bdbdbd",
  32, "Sparsely vegetated areas", "Semi-natural", "#969696",
  33, "Burnt areas", "Semi-natural", "#525252",
  34, "Glaciers and perpetual snow", "Semi-natural", "#f7f7f7",

  # -------------------------------
  # WATER (stronger blue gradient)
  # -------------------------------
  35, "Inland marshes", "Water / wetlands", "#deebf7",
  36, "Peat bogs", "Water / wetlands", "#c6dbef",
  37, "Salt marshes", "Water / wetlands", "#9ecae1",
  38, "Salines", "Water / wetlands", "#6baed6",
  39, "Intertidal flats", "Water / wetlands", "#4292c6",
  40, "Water courses", "Water / wetlands", "#2171b5",
  41, "Water bodies", "Water / wetlands", "#08519c",
  42, "Coastal lagoons", "Water / wetlands", "#08306b",
  43, "Estuaries", "Water / wetlands", "#2171b5",
  44, "Sea and ocean", "Water / wetlands", "#041f4a"
) %>%
  mutate(
    clc_label = stringr::str_wrap(clc_name, 30)
  )


clc_palette <- setNames(clc_palette_df$clc_hex, clc_palette_df$clc_label)
clc_levels  <- clc_palette_df$clc_label
```

```{r clc legend}

# Make sure the labels are wrapped for long names
clc_palette_df <- clc_palette_df %>%
  mutate(
    clc_label = str_wrap(clc_name, width = 30),
    clc_group = factor(
      clc_group,
      levels = c("Urban / built-up", "Agriculture", "Forest", "Semi-natural", "Water / wetlands")
    )
  )

# Keep the palette tied to the wrapped labels
clc_palette <- setNames(clc_palette_df$clc_hex, clc_palette_df$clc_label)
clc_levels  <- clc_palette_df$clc_label

# Split into two publication-friendly columns
left_groups  <- c("Urban / built-up", "Agriculture")
right_groups <- c("Forest", "Semi-natural", "Water / wetlands")

make_legend_column <- function(df, groups, palette, col_title = NULL) {
  y <- 1
  header_rows <- list()
  item_rows   <- list()

  for (grp in groups) {
    gdat <- df %>%
      filter(clc_group == grp) %>%
      arrange(clc_code)

    if (nrow(gdat) == 0) next

    header_rows[[length(header_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
      x = 0.2,
      y = y,
      label = grp
    )
    y <- y + 0.9

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(gdat))) {
      item_rows[[length(item_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        x_tile  = 0.2,
        x_text  = 0.75,
        y       = y,
        clc_name  = gdat$clc_label[i],
        clc_label = paste0(gdat$clc_code[i], "  ", gdat$clc_label[i]),
        clc_hex   = gdat$clc_hex[i]
      )
      y <- y + 0.85
    }

    y <- y + 0.55
  }

  headers <- bind_rows(header_rows)
  items   <- bind_rows(item_rows)

  ggplot() +
    geom_tile(
      data = items,
      aes(x = x_tile, y = y, fill = clc_name),
      width = 0.38,
      height = 0.58,
      colour = "white",
      linewidth = 0.15
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = items,
      aes(x = x_text, y = y, label = clc_label),
      hjust = 0,
      size = 3.1,
      lineheight = 0.95
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = headers,
      aes(x = x, y = y, label = label),
      hjust = 0,
      fontface = "bold",
      size = 4.2
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette, drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 8.2), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_y_reverse(expand = c(0.02, 0.05)) +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    theme_void(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      plot.margin = margin(8, 14, 8, 8)
    )
}

p_legend_left  <- make_legend_column(clc_palette_df, left_groups,  clc_palette)
p_legend_right <- make_legend_column(clc_palette_df, right_groups, clc_palette)

p_clc_legend <- (p_legend_left | p_legend_right) +
  plot_annotation(title = "CORINE Land Cover classes") &
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "CLC_legend.pdf"),
  plot = p_clc_legend,
  width = 14,
  height = 10
)

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(plot_dir, "CLC_legend.png"),
  plot = p_clc_legend,
  width = 14,
  height = 10,
  dpi = 300
)

```

```{r}

files <- list.files("../../wintermoth_data/VIIRS", pattern = "VNP22Q2.*\\.h5$", full.names = TRUE)
years <- as.integer(regmatches(basename(files), regexpr("\\d{4}", basename(files))))
year_files <- files[years == target_year]

extract_vnp <- function(filepath, year) {
  tile_size <- 1111950.5196
  tile_str  <- regmatches(basename(filepath), regexpr("h\\d{2}v\\d{2}", basename(filepath)))
  tile_h    <- as.integer(substr(tile_str, 2, 3))
  tile_v    <- as.integer(substr(tile_str, 5, 6))

  xmin <- (tile_h - 18) * tile_size
  xmax <- xmin + tile_size
  ymax <- (9 - tile_v) * tile_size
  ymin <- ymax - tile_size
  tile_ext <- ext(xmin, xmax, ymin, ymax)

  onset_path <- paste0('HDF5:"', filepath, '"://HDFEOS/GRIDS/Cycle_1/Data_Fields/Onset_Greenness_Increase_1')
  qc_path    <- paste0('HDF5:"', filepath, '"://HDFEOS/GRIDS/Cycle_1/Data_Fields/GLSP_QC_1')
  pgq_path   <- paste0('HDF5:"', filepath, '"://HDFEOS/GRIDS/Cycle_1/Data_Fields/PGQ_Onset_Greenness_Increase_1')

  onset <- flip(rast(onset_path), direction = "vertical")
  qc    <- flip(rast(qc_path),    direction = "vertical")
  pgq   <- flip(rast(pgq_path),   direction = "vertical")

  ext(onset) <- tile_ext; crs(onset) <- sin_crs
  ext(qc)    <- tile_ext; crs(qc)    <- sin_crs
  ext(pgq)   <- tile_ext; crs(pgq)   <- sin_crs

  offset          <- (year - 2000) * 366
  onset_corrected <- app(onset, function(x) ifelse(x == 32767, NA, x - offset))
  qc_clean        <- app(qc,    function(x) ifelse(x == 255,   NA, x))
  pgq_clean       <- app(pgq,   function(x) ifelse(x == 255,   NA, x))

  ext(onset_corrected) <- tile_ext; crs(onset_corrected) <- sin_crs
  ext(qc_clean)        <- tile_ext; crs(qc_clean)        <- sin_crs
  ext(pgq_clean)       <- tile_ext; crs(pgq_clean)       <- sin_crs

  names(onset_corrected) <- "Onset_Greenness_Increase"
  names(qc_clean)        <- "GLSP_QC"
  names(pgq_clean)       <- "PGQ_Onset_Greenness_Increase"

  list(
    raster  = c(onset_corrected, qc_clean, pgq_clean),
    tile_id = tile_str
  )
}

tile_results <- lapply(year_files, extract_vnp, year = target_year)
```


```{r}
all_extracts <- lapply(tile_results, function(tile) {

  r       <- tile$raster
  tile_id <- tile$tile_id

  tile_poly     <- as.polygons(ext(r), crs = sin_crs)
  buf_intersect <- relate(buf_vect, tile_poly, relation = "intersects")
  buf_subset    <- buf_vect[buf_intersect, ]
  if (nrow(buf_subset) == 0) return(NULL)

  r_crop        <- crop(r, buf_subset)
  tile_poly_clc <- project(tile_poly, clc_crs)
  clc_crop_nat  <- crop(clc_rast, tile_poly_clc)
  clc_crop_sin  <- project(clc_crop_nat, sin_crs, method = "near")

  extracted <- extract(
    r_crop,
    buf_subset,
    fun = NULL,
    ID = TRUE,
    cells = TRUE,
    xy = TRUE
  )
  if (is.null(extracted) || nrow(extracted) == 0) return(NULL)

  buf_df <- as.data.frame(buf_subset) %>%
  mutate(.row_id = seq_len(n()))

  extracted <- extracted %>%
  left_join(buf_df %>% select(.row_id, pop), by = c("ID" = ".row_id"))
  extracted$tile_id <- tile_id
  extracted$year    <- target_year
  names(extracted)[names(extracted) == "cell"] <- "pixel_id"

  pixel_tbl <- extracted %>%
    distinct(pixel_id, x, y)

  hx <- res(r_crop)[1] / 2
  hy <- res(r_crop)[2] / 2

  pixel_sfc <- st_sfc(
    lapply(seq_len(nrow(pixel_tbl)), function(i) {
      make_square(pixel_tbl$x[i], pixel_tbl$y[i], hx, hy)
    }),
    crs = sin_crs
  )

  pixel_sf <- st_sf(pixel_tbl, geometry = pixel_sfc)
  pixel_sf$clc_code <- as.integer(exact_extract(clc_crop_sin, pixel_sf, "mode"))

  extracted <- extracted %>%
    left_join(
      st_drop_geometry(pixel_sf) %>% select(pixel_id, clc_code),
      by = "pixel_id"
    ) %>%
    select(-ID)

  extracted
})

final_long <- bind_rows(Filter(Negate(is.null), all_extracts)) %>%
  select(
    pop, tile_id, year, pixel_id, x, y,
    Onset_Greenness_Increase, GLSP_QC, PGQ_Onset_Greenness_Increase,
    clc_code
  ) %>%
  arrange(pop, tile_id, pixel_id)

final_long <- bind_cols(final_long, decode_glsp_qc(final_long$GLSP_QC)) %>%
  left_join(clc_lookup, by = "clc_code")
```

```{r}
for (site_to_run in unique(square_buffers$pop)) {
  message("Generating figures for site: ", site_to_run)
  
  site_buf_sin <- square_buffers %>% filter(pop == site_to_run)
  site_buf_wgs <- st_transform(site_buf_sin, wgs_crs)
  site_buf_clc <- st_transform(site_buf_sin, clc_crs)
  
  site_pt_wgs <- location_sf %>% filter(pop == site_to_run)
  site_pt_sin <- st_transform(site_pt_wgs, sin_crs)
  site_pt_clc <- st_transform(site_pt_wgs, clc_crs)
  
  site_extract <- final_long %>% filter(pop == site_to_run)
  
  # Skip if no data for this site
  if (nrow(site_extract) == 0) {
    message("  No VIIRS data for ", site_to_run, " — skipping")
    next
  }
  
  site_pixels <- site_extract %>%
    select(x, y, Onset_Greenness_Increase) %>%
    group_by(x, y) %>%
    summarise(Onset_Greenness_Increase = first(Onset_Greenness_Increase), .groups = "drop") %>%
    filter(!is.na(x), !is.na(y))
  
  viirs_res <- res(tile_results[[1]]$raster)[1]
  hx <- viirs_res / 2
  hy <- viirs_res / 2
  
  site_pixel_sf <- st_sf(
    site_pixels,
    geometry = st_sfc(
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(site_pixels)), function(i) {
        make_square(site_pixels$x[i], site_pixels$y[i], hx, hy)
      }),
      crs = sin_crs
    )
  )
  
  # Fix: define clc_site_sin before it's used
clc_site_nat <- crop(clc_rast, vect(site_buf_clc))

# Set factor levels so geom_spatraster maps colours correctly
levels(clc_site_nat) <- data.frame(
  value    = clc_palette_df$clc_code,
  clc_name = clc_palette_df$clc_label
)

clc_site_sin <- project(clc_site_nat, sin_crs, method = "near")

  
  site_pixel_clc <- st_transform(site_pixel_sf, clc_crs)
  site_pixel_wgs <- st_transform(site_pixel_sf, wgs_crs)
  
  site_pixel_sf <- site_pixel_sf %>%
    mutate(clc_code = as.integer(exact_extract(clc_site_sin, site_pixel_sf, "mode"))) %>%
    left_join(clc_palette_df %>% select(clc_code, clc_label), by = "clc_code") %>%
    mutate(clc_label = factor(clc_label, levels = clc_levels))
  
  # --- panels (unchanged from your original, just using clc_label not clc_name) ---
  p1 <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = site_pixel_sf, aes(fill = Onset_Greenness_Increase),
            colour = "grey35", linewidth = 0.15) +
    geom_sf(data = site_buf_sin, fill = NA, colour = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_sf(data = site_pt_sin, shape = 4, size = 3.5, stroke = 1.2, colour = "black") +
    scale_fill_gradientn(colours = hcl.colors(100, "RdYlGn"),
                         name = "Day of year", na.value = "grey80") +
    coord_sf(crs = sin_crs) +
    labs(title = paste0(site_to_run, " — LSP Onset of Greenness (", target_year, ")"),
         subtitle = "Grey lines = VIIRS pixel borders; X = sampling point") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

# Replace the p2 block with this:
p2 <- ggplot() +
  tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = clc_site_nat, aes(fill = clc_name)) +
  geom_sf(data = site_pixel_clc, fill = NA, colour = "grey35", linewidth = 0.15) +
  geom_sf(data = site_buf_clc,   fill = NA, colour = "red",    linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_sf(data = site_pt_clc,    shape = 4, size = 3.5, stroke = 1.2, colour = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values    = clc_palette,
    drop      = FALSE,
    na.value  = "grey80",
    name      = "CLC class",
    guide     = "none"
  ) +
  labs(title = "CLC — native resolution") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

  p3 <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = site_pixel_sf, aes(fill = clc_label),
            colour = "grey35", linewidth = 0.15) +
    geom_sf(data = site_buf_sin, fill = NA, colour = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_sf(data = site_pt_sin, shape = 4, size = 3.5, stroke = 1.2, colour = "black") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = clc_palette, drop = FALSE,
                      na.value = "grey80", name = "CLC class", guide = "none") +
    coord_sf(crs = sin_crs) +
    labs(title = "CLC — resampled to the VIIRS pixel grid") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

  sat <- fetch_satellite_basemap(site_buf_wgs)
  if (!is.null(sat) && nlyr(sat) >= 3) {
    sat_rgb <- sat[[1:3]]
    names(sat_rgb) <- c("r", "g", "b")
    p4 <- ggplot() +
      tidyterra::geom_spatraster_rgb(data = sat_rgb) +
      geom_sf(data = site_pixel_wgs, fill = NA, colour = "grey35", linewidth = 0.15) +
      geom_sf(data = site_buf_wgs, fill = NA, colour = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
      geom_sf(data = site_pt_wgs, shape = 4, size = 3.5, stroke = 1.2, colour = "black") +
      coord_sf(crs = wgs_crs, expand = FALSE) +
      labs(title = "Satellite image (ESRI World Imagery)") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 10)
  } else {
    p4 <- ggplot() +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5, label = "Satellite image unavailable") +
      theme_void()
  }

  combined <- (p1 | p4) / (p2 | p3) +
    plot_annotation(
      title   = paste0("Site: ", site_to_run, " | ", target_year),
      caption = "Red box = 5×5 km buffer | Grey lines = VIIRS pixel borders | X = sampling point"
    )

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(plot_dir, paste0(site_to_run, "_", target_year, ".png")),
    plot     = combined,
    width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 150
  )
  
  message("  Saved: ", site_to_run, "_", target_year, ".png")
}
```

```{r}

write.csv(final_long, file.path(plot_dir, "wm_clc_test.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
message("Done.")
```
